title: Unobtrusive Particles
description: Small resource pack that changes the texture of particles to transparent.
body:
# **

Unobtrusive Particles

** ![Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98e5051e8d1d1fd79fecbb2f2a5fcb5ed1ff6b9d.png) # **What does this resource pack do?** Now particles such as explosions, smoke from a campfire, rain, or even falling leaves look softer without disrupting the overall aesthetics of the game.
### **Minimalism without losing functionality** All particles remain in their places, performing their role.
